target.title: fix(agent): load shared tools bootstrap instructions
target.body:
## Summary
- Auto-load `TOOLS_SHARED.md` as an optional workspace bootstrap file.
- Route `TOOLS_SHARED.md` through Codex inherited developer instructions alongside `TOOLS.md`.
- Allow the intended workspace-local symlink shape: `<agent>/TOOLS_SHARED.md -> ../shared/TOOLS.md`, while rejecting other sibling targets.
- Document the public bootstrap surface, subagent/cron context behavior, bootstrap-extra-files behavior, and the exact sibling symlink exception.

## Compatibility and security-boundary intent

This PR intentionally adds a new optional workspace bootstrap file surface. Existing workspaces that already contain `TOOLS_SHARED.md`, or the exact supported sibling symlink `<agent-workspace>/TOOLS_SHARED.md -> ../shared/TOOLS.md`, will start injecting that file after upgrade.

The cross-workspace read exception is intentionally narrow: it only applies to `TOOLS_SHARED.md`, only accepts the sibling shared target `../shared/TOOLS.md` after realpath comparison, and continues to reject other sibling workspace targets. This preserves the workspace-root read boundary while supporting the documented multi-agent shared-tools layout.

`TOOLS_SHARED.md` follows the same lifetime class as `TOOLS.md`: native Codex receives both as inherited developer instructions, subagents receive `AGENTS.md`/`TOOLS.md`/`TOOLS_SHARED.md`, and cron sessions include `TOOLS_SHARED.md` alongside the existing cron bootstrap allowlist.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Workspace bootstrap now loads a workspace-local `TOOLS_SHARED.md` entry so an agent can combine its own `TOOLS.md` with shared tool guidance.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout with a redacted agent workspace using the intended `TOOLS_SHARED.md -> ../shared/TOOLS.md` symlink shape. No channel credentials or provider API keys were used.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a local loader probe against the redacted workspace after applying this patch.
- Evidence after fix: Copied live command output with machine/user paths and file content redacted:

```json
{
  "workspaceDir": "<agent-workspace>",
  "link": "TOOLS_SHARED.md",
  "symlinkTarget": "../shared/TOOLS.md",
  "loaded": true,
  "loadedName": "TOOLS_SHARED.md",
  "loadedPath": "<agent-workspace>/TOOLS_SHARED.md",
  "contentPresent": true
}
```

- Observed result after fix: `loadWorkspaceBootstrapFiles()` returned `TOOLS_SHARED.md` as loaded from the workspace-local symlink path, with content present and without exposing the shared file content.
- What was not tested: No full live Codex model turn was sent; this proof covers the workspace bootstrap loader behavior changed by this PR.

## Validation

After rebasing onto current `origin/main`:

- `pnpm check:docs`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm prompt:snapshots:check`
- `pnpm vitest run src/agents/workspace.test.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts test/scripts/prompt-snapshots.test.ts -- --runInBand` — 6 files / 268 tests passed
- `pnpm vitest run src/agents/workspace.load-extra-bootstrap-files.test.ts src/hooks/bundled/bootstrap-extra-files/handler.test.ts -- --runInBand` — 3 files / 16 tests passed
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm exec oxlint extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-context.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts src/agents/workspace.ts src/agents/workspace.test.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.ts test/helpers/agents/happy-path-prompt-snapshots.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/codex/src/app-server/attempt-context.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts src/agents/workspace.ts src/agents/workspace.test.ts src/agents/bootstrap-files.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.ts test/helpers/agents/happy-path-prompt-snapshots.ts`
- `git diff --check`

Note: a local full `pnpm lint:core` run on the rebased branch reported three `no-unnecessary-type-assertion` findings in `src/commands/test-runtime-config-helpers.ts`, outside this PR's changed files. Changed-file oxlint for this PR's source/test files passed.
target.author: mantisai-bot
